examples: My sweater shrank in the wash.
People were short in those days – or else those military uniforms all shrank in the wash!
Astrogeologists suspect that these scarps having formed billions of years ago as the planet's surface cooled and shrank.
In 2008 when Argentina's output briefly shrank, the government balanced its books by nationalising private pensions.
Its profits shrank during the 2008-09 recession, an experience that led the company to emphasize value.
